title: Evolution
questions: What springs to mind when you hear the word 'evolution'?
Do you believe the story of evolution as told in religious books?
How do you think the world got here?
How do you think we got here?
What do you think we will look like millions of years from now?
Why have we evolved into different looks and colours?
How was the very first life form created and what did it do/look like?
Why is Darwin's Theory of Evolution discarded by so many religions?
Many schools in the USA teach creationism - the idea that God put humans on Earth as we are today. What do you think of this?
Do you think God created everything as it is outlined in the book of Genesis?
What do you understand by the term 'natural selection'?
Do you think Darwin's theory of evolution is the best?
Do you think we descended from the apes?
Do you think humans are set apart from the animal kingdom?
Many followers of the 'Intelligent Design' theory say we were created by an intelligent designer. What do you think?
What do you think of the 'survival of the fittest' theory?
Do you think evolution is a random process?
How long ago did human become human and what made us human?
Can you watch evolution happening?
How can we know what happened millions of years ago?
